title: tragacantha tenuicaulis
intro: Tragacantha tenuicaulis, also known as the slender spine milk thistle or slender spiny milk thistle, is a plant species within the thistle family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which have been used to treat liver and gallbladder issues due to its high concentration of silymarin, a flavonoid compound. The health benefits of Tragacantha tenuicaulis include its ability to protect the liver from damage, promote bile production, and support the immune system. Tragacantha tenuicaulis is typically prepared into herbal supplements, such as capsules or tablets, or used in traditional medicine as a tea or infusion.
